description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wardrobe with a modern design, featuring two vertically aligned doors on the front. The doors have large, dark-tinted glass or mirror panels set within a wood-textured frame, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The handles are small, round knobs positioned at a comfortable height for easy access. The sides and top of the wardrobe are finished in a matching wood grain, while the back appears to be a plain, lighter-colored panel. The overall construction suggests a sturdy build, likely suitable for storing clothing or other personal items. Its neutral gray tones and minimalist style make it well-suited for urban interiors or semi-public spaces such as apartment lobbies or office break rooms.
description: A tall, modern wardrobe with two glass-paneled doors, wood-textured frame, and round handles. Its sleek, gray finish and minimalist design make it ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, dark glass or mirror panels set in wood-textured doors with round handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the wood grain texture and the depth of the wardrobe, with no visible doors or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, light-colored back panel with no decorative features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the wood grain texture and the wardrobe's depth.
